title: agrostis subulifolia
intro: Agrostis subulifolia, also known as hair grass or dew grass, is a species of grass native to certain parts of the world. The medicinal properties of Agrostis subulifolia are primarily attributed to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various ailments. This plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin conditions. Agrostis subulifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
